Globals.signature: Globals { GridFile=<string> ParameterFile=<string> ResultFile=<string> LogFile=<string> NumberOfThreads=<int> TotalTimeSteps=<int> }
Globals.description: Defines global simulation parameters including the tensor grid file, material parameter file, output file names, parallelization settings, and time-stepping controls. This section is mandatory and must occur exactly once.

parameters.name: GridFile
parameters.desc: Tensor grid file for the simulation.

parameters.name: ParameterFile
parameters.desc: Specifies the material parameter file.

parameters.name: ResultFile
parameters.desc: Name of result file. Default: result_eml.plt.

parameters.name: LogFile
parameters.desc: Name of the log file. By default, the name of the command file is used with the extension .log. If the name ends with .z or .gz, a compressed log file will be written.

parameters.name: NumberOfThreads
parameters.desc: Number of threads to be used for shared-memory parallelization. Either an integer greater than zero or 'maximum'.

parameters.name: OutputFilePrefix
parameters.desc: Optional. String to be prepended to all output file names including the log file.

parameters.name: CompressTDR
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls whether output TDR files are compressed beyond the basic compression level. Options: Yes, No.

parameters.name: CRIMIPath
parameters.desc: Optional. Search path for shared objects used by complex refractive index model interface. Default: '.'.

parameters.name: DomainDecomposition
parameters.desc: Optional. Overrides automatic MPI domain decomposition. Used to enforce domain decomposition in only one Cartesian direction. Options: Automatic, X, Y, Z.

parameters.name: FieldDataFile
parameters.desc: Optional. Data file containing datasets, for example, spatial temperature profile, on which the complex refractive index depends.

parameters.name: LoadFile
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of the results file to be loaded for postprocessing.

parameters.name: OverSampling
parameters.desc: Optional. Reduces the calculated maximum stable time step by the OverSampling factor. Default: 1.

parameters.name: ParallelLicenses
parameters.desc: Optional. List of allowed licenses to be used by EMW when run in parallel mode. Options: MPI, SMP. Default: {MPI SMP}.

parameters.name: TdrNativeTensorGridUnit
parameters.desc: Optional. Overrides automatic detection of length unit in input tensor grid. Options: Automatic, m, um.

parameters.name: Temperature
parameters.desc: Optional. Global device temperature in Kelvin. Default: 300.

parameters.name: TimeStep
parameters.desc: Optional. Overwrites calculated simulation time step.

parameters.name: TotalSimulationTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Maximum simulation time after which the simulation is terminated.

parameters.name: TotalTimeSteps
parameters.desc: Optional. Maximum number of time steps to be performed.

parameters.name: UnavailableLicenseAction
parameters.desc: Optional. Action to be taken when requested license is not available. Options: serial, reduce, wait, abort.

Globals.example:
Globals {
  GridFile        = "@tdr@"
  ParameterFile   = "@parameter@"
  ResultFile      = "@plot@"
  LogFile         = "@log@"
  NumberOfThreads = 1
  TotalTimeSteps  = 50000
  OverSampling    = 3.6
}

ComplexRefractiveIndex.description: Specifies the complex refractive index distribution for materials or regions in the simulation domain. Supports homogeneous, inhomogeneous, and file-based distributions with optional wavelength, temperature, carrier, and gain dependencies.

parameters.name: Material
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which the complex refractive index specification applies.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which the complex refractive index specification applies.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls type of complex refractive index distribution. Options: Homogeneous, Inhomogeneous, FromFile. Default: Homogeneous.

parameters.name: WavelengthDep
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls wavelength dependency of real and imaginary parts. Options: Real, Imag.

parameters.name: TemperatureDep
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls temperature dependency. Options: Real, Imag.

parameters.name: CarrierDep
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls carrier dependency of real and imaginary parts. Options: Real, Imag.

parameters.name: GainDep
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls gain dependency of real part. Options: RealLin, RealLog.

parameters.name: Extrapolate
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls extrapolation behavior for interpolation of datasets in FieldDataFile. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

parameters.name: IgnoreMaterials
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls whether interpolation between vertices of different materials is permitted when loading datasets. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

parameters.name: CRIModel
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of user-provided complex refractive index model.

DispersiveMedia.description: Specifies dispersive media models for materials that exhibit frequency-dependent permittivity. Supports Debye, Drude, Lorentz, and modulated Lorentz models with parameters computed from the complex refractive index or user-defined.

parameters.name: Material
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which the dispersive medium specification applies.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which the dispersive medium specification applies.

parameters.name: Model
parameters.desc: Selects dispersive model. Options: Debye, Drude, DrudeLorentz, DrudeModLorentz, Lorentz, ModLorentz, SingleDipoleDebye, SingleDipoleDrude.

parameters.name: ModelParameters
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies how dispersive model parameters are determined. Options: ComputeFromComplexRefractiveIndex, UserDefined. Default: ComputeFromComplexRefractiveIndex.

parameters.name: DeltaK
parameters.desc: Optional. Activate dispersive model for k + DeltaK >= n. Default: 0.

parameters.name: ExcludeMaterial
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which dispersive medium specification does not apply.

parameters.name: ExcludeRegion
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which dispersive medium specification does not apply.

parameters.name: InterfaceAveraging
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls whether interface averaging is granted for dispersive regions or materials. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

PECMedia.description: Assigns perfect electric conductor (PEC) properties to specified materials or regions. PEC media reflect electromagnetic waves perfectly with zero tangential electric field at the surface.

parameters.name: Material
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which the PEC medium specification applies.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which the PEC medium specification applies.

parameters.name: ExcludeMaterial
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which PEC medium specification does not apply.

parameters.name: ExcludeRegion
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which PEC medium specification does not apply.

PMCMedia.description: Assigns perfect magnetic conductor (PMC) properties to specified materials or regions. PMC media reflect electromagnetic waves with zero tangential magnetic field at the surface.

parameters.name: Material
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which the PMC medium specification applies.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which the PMC medium specification applies.

parameters.name: ExcludeMaterial
parameters.desc: Names of materials to which PMC medium specification does not apply.

parameters.name: ExcludeRegion
parameters.desc: Names of regions to which PMC medium specification does not apply.

Boundary.description: Defines boundary conditions for the simulation domain. Supports CPML, Higdon, Mur, PEC, Periodic, PeriodicOblique, and PMC boundary types. This section is mandatory and can occur up to six times to specify different conditions for different sides.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.desc: Type of boundary condition. Options: CPML, Higdon, Mur, PEC, Periodic, PeriodicOblique, PMC. Default: PeriodicOblique.

parameters.name: Sides
parameters.desc: Sides to which the boundary specification applies. Options: All, X, Xmin, Xmax, Y, Ymin, Ymax, Z, Zmin, Zmax. Default: {All}.

parameters.name: Thickness
parameters.desc: Optional. Thickness of PML boundary in terms of number of tensor-grid cells. Default: 15.

parameters.name: SigmaMax
parameters.desc: Optional. Maximum value of PML parameter sigma. The default value is computed automatically.

parameters.name: SigmaProfile
parameters.desc: Optional. Profile of PML parameter sigma used in grading of PML tensor coefficient.

parameters.name: OrderSigma
parameters.desc: Optional. Order of polynomial grading for PML parameter sigma. Default: 3.

parameters.name: AlphaMax
parameters.desc: Optional. Maximum value of PML parameter alpha. Default: 0.2.

parameters.name: AlphaProfile
parameters.desc: Optional. Profile of PML parameter alpha used in grading of PML tensor coefficient.

parameters.name: OrderAlpha
parameters.desc: Optional. Order of polynomial grading for PML parameter alpha. Default: 1.

parameters.name: KappaMax
parameters.desc: Optional. Maximum value of PML parameter kappa. Default: 15.

parameters.name: KappaProfile
parameters.desc: Optional. Profile of PML parameter kappa used in grading of PML tensor coefficient.

parameters.name: OrderKappa
parameters.desc: Optional. Order of polynomial grading for PML parameter kappa. Default: 3.

PlaneWaveExcitation.signature: PlaneWaveExcitation { Wavelength=<float> Intensity=<float> Direction=<enum> Theta=<float> Phi=<float> Psi=<float> }
PlaneWaveExcitation.description: Defines a plane wave excitation source for the simulation. Supports illumination from top or bottom, arbitrary angles of incidence, and both harmonic and Gaussian transient signal forms with polarization control.

parameters.name: Wavelength
parameters.desc: Signal wavelength in nm.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Signal frequency in s-1.

parameters.name: Amplitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal amplitude in V/m. Default: 1.

parameters.name: Intensity
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal intensity in W/cm^2. Default: 1.32721e-07.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.desc: Optional. Illumination direction. Automatically sets Theta, Phi, Psi, and excitation plane. Options: fromTop, fromBottom.

parameters.name: Theta
parameters.desc: Optional. Polar angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 180.

parameters.name: Phi
parameters.desc: Optional. Azimuth angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Psi
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: Polarization
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization, either TE (0) or TM (1), or a value between 0 and 1. Default: 0.5.

parameters.name: PolarizationAngle
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationMagnitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio magnitude. Default: 0.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationPhase
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio phase in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Signal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the transient form of the signal. Options: Gauss, Harmonic. Default: Harmonic.

parameters.name: Sigma
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of transient Gaussian pulse in terms of number of signal periods. Default: 1.

parameters.name: NRise
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before full amplitude is reached. Default: 2.

parameters.name: Delay
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before signal starts. Default: 0.

parameters.name: NumberOfPlaneWaves
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of excitation plane waves. Default: 1.

parameters.name: NumericalAperture
parameters.desc: Optional. Numerical aperture. Default: 0.

parameters.name: PartialCoherenceFactor
parameters.desc: Optional. Partial coherence factor. Default: 1.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

PlaneWaveExcitation.example:
PlaneWaveExcitation {
  PlaneY     = -0.5
  Theta      = 0
  Psi        = 0
  Wavelength = 550
  Intensity  = 0.1 * W/cm2
  Nrise      = 4
}

CodeVExcitation.description: Defines an excitation source from CODE V optical design software data files. Requires two input data files and their anchor points to reconstruct the excitation field pattern.

parameters.name: InputDataFile
parameters.desc: Names of two input data files from CODE V.

parameters.name: AnchorPoint1
parameters.desc: Anchor point (of smallest coordinates) for the first data file in um.

parameters.name: AnchorPoint2
parameters.desc: Anchor point (of smallest coordinates) for the second data file in um.

parameters.name: Wavelength
parameters.desc: Signal wavelength in nm.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Signal frequency in s-1.

parameters.name: Signal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets transient form of the signal. Options: Gauss, Harmonic. Default: Harmonic.

parameters.name: AmplitudeScaling
parameters.desc: Optional. Scaling factor for electric field amplitude. Default: 1.

parameters.name: Delay
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before signal starts. Default: 0.

parameters.name: NRise
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before full amplitude is reached. Default: 2.

parameters.name: PhaseShift
parameters.desc: Optional. Linear phase shift for electric field in degrees. Default: 0.

GaussianBeamExcitation.description: Defines a Gaussian beam excitation source with controllable beam waist, center position, and illumination direction. Supports both harmonic and Gaussian transient signal forms.

parameters.name: Wavelength
parameters.desc: Signal wavelength in nm.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Signal frequency in s-1.

parameters.name: BeamRadius
parameters.desc: Radius (waist) of the Gaussian beam in um.

parameters.name: BeamCenter
parameters.desc: Coordinates of the center (focus) of the Gaussian beam in um.

parameters.name: BeamPower
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal power of the Gaussian beam in W. Default: 2.08478e-15.

parameters.name: Amplitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal amplitude in V/m. Default: 1.

parameters.name: Intensity
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal intensity in W/cm^2. Default: 1.32721e-07.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.desc: Optional. Illumination direction. Options: fromTop, fromBottom.

parameters.name: Theta
parameters.desc: Optional. Polar angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 180.

parameters.name: Phi
parameters.desc: Optional. Azimuth angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Psi
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: Polarization
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization, either TE or TM, or a value between 0 and 1. Default: 0.5.

parameters.name: PolarizationAngle
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationMagnitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio magnitude. Default: 0.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationPhase
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio phase in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Signal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the transient form of the signal. Options: Gauss, Harmonic. Default: Harmonic.

parameters.name: Sigma
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of transient Gaussian pulse in terms of number of signal periods. Default: 1.

parameters.name: NRise
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before full amplitude is reached. Default: 2.

parameters.name: Delay
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before signal starts. Default: 0.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation.signature: TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation { Wavelength=<float> Intensity=<float> BoxCorner1=<list> BoxCorner2=<list> Direction=<enum> }
TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation.description: Defines a truncated plane wave excitation with finite spatial extent specified by box corners. Supports partial coherence and multiple plane waves with the same polarization and angle controls as PlaneWaveExcitation.

parameters.name: Wavelength
parameters.desc: Signal wavelength in nm.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Signal frequency in s-1.

parameters.name: Amplitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal amplitude in V/m. Default: 1.

parameters.name: Intensity
parameters.desc: Optional. Signal intensity in W/cm^2. Default: 1.32721e-07.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: Direction
parameters.desc: Optional. Illumination direction. Options: fromTop, fromBottom.

parameters.name: Theta
parameters.desc: Optional. Polar angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 180.

parameters.name: Phi
parameters.desc: Optional. Azimuth angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Psi
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: Polarization
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization, either TE or TM, or a value between 0 and 1. Default: 0.5.

parameters.name: PolarizationAngle
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationMagnitude
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio magnitude. Default: 0.

parameters.name: EllipticalPolarizationPhase
parameters.desc: Optional. Polarization ratio phase in degrees. Default: 0.

parameters.name: Signal
parameters.desc: Optional. Sets the transient form of the signal. Options: Gauss, Harmonic. Default: Harmonic.

parameters.name: Sigma
parameters.desc: Optional. Width of transient Gaussian pulse in terms of number of signal periods. Default: 1.

parameters.name: NRise
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before full amplitude is reached. Default: 2.

parameters.name: Delay
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of signal periods before signal starts. Default: 0.

parameters.name: NumberOfPlaneWaves
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of excitation plane waves. Default: 1.

parameters.name: NumericalAperture
parameters.desc: Optional. Numerical aperture. Default: 0.

parameters.name: PartialCoherenceFactor
parameters.desc: Optional. Partial coherence factor. Default: 1.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Box that specifies the excitation plane.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

Detector.description: Monitors the convergence of the electromagnetic field simulation and terminates the time-stepping when the field has reached steady state. The simulation stops when the maximum deviation is smaller than the specified tolerance.

parameters.name: Tolerance
parameters.desc: The simulation is terminated when the maximum deviation is smaller than this value. Default: 0.001.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.desc: Optional. Type of detector. Options: Periodic, Decayed. Default: Periodic.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Optional. Detector frequency in s-1. The default value is calculated from the excitation wavelength.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Valid box or region name of the tensor grid where the detector is evaluated.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the detector domain.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the detector domain.

parameters.name: StartTick
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of tick steps when to start the detector evaluation. Default: 0.

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Simulation time when to start the detector evaluation. Default: 0.

parameters.name: StepX
parameters.desc: Optional. Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the x-direction. Default: 10.

parameters.name: StepY
parameters.desc: Optional. Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the y-direction. Default: 10.

parameters.name: StepZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the z-direction. Default: 10.

parameters.name: BreakOnError
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether the simulation stops if an error is encountered. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

parameters.name: FailureOnUnreachedTolerance
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether the exit code will be nonzero if tolerance is not reached. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

Plot.description: Outputs field data to TDR files for visualization. Supports volume and surface plotting of electromagnetic field quantities, complex refractive index, and derived quantities such as absorbed photon density.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the plot, which also is used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.

parameters.name: Quantity
parameters.desc: Sets the list of quantities to be plotted. Options include: AbsElectricField, RealElectricField(X/Y/Z), ImagElectricField(X/Y/Z), AbsMagneticField, RealMagneticField(X/Y/Z), ImagMagneticField(X/Y/Z), CplxRefIndex, CplxExtCoeff, AbsorbedPhotonDensity, PowerFluxDensity, OpticalGeneration, Region, and many more. Default: {AbsElectricField}.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be plotted.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be plotted.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Regions for which data must be plotted.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Plot domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Plot domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Plot domain specified as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

parameters.name: Domain
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether values for Volume or Surface will be plotted. Options: Surface, Volume. Default: Volume.

parameters.name: Sides
parameters.desc: Optional. When Domain=Surface, defines the sidewall where plotting will be performed. Options: All, X, Xmin, Xmax, Y, Ymin, Ymax, Z, Zmin, Zmax. Default: {All}.

parameters.name: GridFile
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of mixed-element grid file for output data.

parameters.name: Interpolation
parameters.desc: Optional. Method of interpolating plot data from tensor grid to mixed-element grid. Options: Standard, Simple, Conservative. Default: Standard.

parameters.name: StartTick
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: EndTick
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active time interval.

parameters.name: EndTime
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active time interval.

parameters.name: TickStep
parameters.desc: Optional. Plotting is performed every N tick steps. Default: 100.

parameters.name: FinalPlot
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls whether a final plot is created at end of simulation. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

parameters.name: ScatteredFieldOnly
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether the plot involves only scattered fields. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

parameters.name: WriteBehavior
parameters.desc: Optional. Controls how consecutive plot instances are written. Options: Numbered, Overwrite, OverwriteAndNumbered. Default: Numbered.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

Extractor.description: Extracts field quantities from the tensor grid to TDR files, optionally mapping data onto a mixed-element grid. Supports extraction of absorbed photon density, power flux density, optical generation, and electromagnetic field components.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the extractor, which also is used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.

parameters.name: Quantity
parameters.desc: Specifies the quantities to extract. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, AbsorbedPowerDensity, OpticalGeneration, PowerFluxDensity, AbsElectricField, RealElectricField(X/Y/Z), ImagElectricField(X/Y/Z), RealMagneticField(X/Y/Z), ImagMagneticField(X/Y/Z), Region.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be extracted.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be extracted.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Regions for which data must be extracted.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Extractor domain as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Extractor domain as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Extractor domain as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

parameters.name: GridFile
parameters.desc: Optional. Name of mixed-element grid file for output data.

parameters.name: Interpolation
parameters.desc: Optional. Way of interpolating extraction data from tensor grid to mixed-element grid. Options: Standard, Simple, Conservative. Default: Standard.

parameters.name: ScatteredFieldOnly
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether the extractor involves only scattered fields. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

Sensor.signature: Sensor { Name=<string> Quantity=<enum> Mode=<list> BoxCorner1=<list> BoxCorner2=<list> }
Sensor.description: Integrates or averages field quantities over a specified volume, surface, or plane. Commonly used to compute reflection, transmission, and absorption coefficients by placing sensors at appropriate locations.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the sensor, which also is used in the dataset name in the result file.

parameters.name: Quantity
parameters.desc: Specifies the integration quantity. Fluxes are integrated over surfaces; all others are integrated over volume. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, AbsorbedPowerDensity, OpticalGeneration, PowerFluxDensity, PhotonFluxDensity, IncoherentAbsorbedPhotonDensity, IncoherentOpticalGeneration.

parameters.name: Mode
parameters.desc: Optional. Integrate integrates a quantity over a surface or volume. Average divides the integrated value by the volume or surface area. Options: Integrate, Average. Default: {Integrate Average}.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the sensor domain.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box that specifies the sensor domain.

parameters.name: BoxCenter
parameters.desc: Optional. Center of a nonaxis-aligned box in um.

parameters.name: BoxDimensions
parameters.desc: Optional. Dimensions of a nonaxis-aligned box in um.

parameters.name: RotationAngles
parameters.desc: Optional. Rotation angles (theta, phi, psi) of a nonaxis-aligned box in degrees. Default: {0 90 0}.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Regions to which sensor applies.

parameters.name: Material
parameters.desc: Optional. Materials to which sensor applies.

parameters.name: Domains
parameters.desc: Optional. Set operation on volumes defined by region and box corners. Options: United, Intersecting, Separate. Default: Separate.

parameters.name: PlaneX
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensor domain as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneY
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensor domain as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

parameters.name: PlaneZ
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensor domain as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

parameters.name: Sides
parameters.desc: Optional. If the quantity is a flux, specifies the sides for integration. Options: All, X, Xmin, Xmax, Y, Ymin, Ymax, Z, Zmin, Zmax. Default: {All}.

parameters.name: CoordinateTransformation
parameters.desc: Optional. Type of coordinate transformation. Options: Standard, Unified. Default: Unified.

parameters.name: ScatteredFieldOnly
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies whether the sensor involves only scattered fields. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensor frequency in s-1. Default is calculated from excitation wavelength.

parameters.name: StartTick
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: EndTick
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active time interval.

parameters.name: EndTime
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active time interval.

parameters.name: TickStep
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensing is performed every N tick steps. Default: 100.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

RTA.description: Computes reflection (R), transmission (T), and absorption (A) coefficients by integrating Poynting vector fluxes over the simulation domain boundaries. Results are written as DOE parameters to the log file.

parameters.name: Log
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies quantities written as DOE parameters to the log file. Options: R, T, A, RTA, Rnorm, Tnorm, Anorm, all, none. Default: {all}.

parameters.name: Sensors
parameters.desc: Optional. Type of sensors to be activated. Options: R, T, A, all. Default: {all}.

parameters.name: LogPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of digits to the right of the decimal point for DOE parameters. Default: 3.

parameters.name: StartTick
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: EndTick
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active time interval.

parameters.name: EndTime
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active time interval.

parameters.name: TickStep
parameters.desc: Optional. Sensing is performed every N tick steps. Default: 100.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

DFT.description: Configures discrete Fourier transform (DFT) settings for multi-wavelength simulations. Defines the wavelength table over which the DFT is computed, enabling broadband spectral analysis from a single time-domain simulation.

parameters.name: MinWavelength
parameters.desc: Start wavelength of the DFT wavelength table.

parameters.name: MaxWavelength
parameters.desc: End wavelength of the DFT wavelength table.

parameters.name: NumberOfWavelengths
parameters.desc: Number of elements in the DFT wavelength table.

parameters.name: DownSampling
parameters.desc: Optional. Downsampling rate of DFT.

Farfield.description: Computes the far-field radiation pattern from a near-field surface in the simulation domain. Supports angular discretization in both polar and azimuthal directions, array factor modeling, and power integration over angular ranges.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the far field, which also is used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: One of the two corners of a box defining the near-field plane for far-field computation.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: One of the two corners of a box defining the near-field plane for far-field computation.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Near-field region to be used for far-field computation. Must be a plane in the 3D domain.

parameters.name: Radius
parameters.desc: Optional. Radius (distance) at which the far field is calculated in um. Default: 1000.

parameters.name: ArraySize
parameters.desc: Optional. Number of times the near-field domain is replicated in each coordinate direction. Default: {1 1}.

parameters.name: PolarRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Range and discretization of polar angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees. Default: {0 90 1}.

parameters.name: AzimuthalRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Range and discretization of azimuthal angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees. Default: {0 360 1}.

parameters.name: PolarCutList
parameters.desc: Optional. Explicit list of polar angles for constant-polar-angle plots.

parameters.name: PolarCutRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Range of polar angles {Min, Max, Step} for constant-polar-angle plots.

parameters.name: AzimuthalCutList
parameters.desc: Optional. Explicit list of azimuthal angles for constant-azimuthal-angle plots.

parameters.name: AzimuthalCutRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Range of azimuthal angles {Min, Max, Step} for constant-azimuthal-angle plots.

parameters.name: IntegrationRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Integration ranges for power computation in format {MinAzi, MaxAzi, AziStep, MinPol, MaxPol, PolStep}.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

Monitor.signature: Monitor { Name=<string> Location=<list> Quantity=<list> StartTick=<int> EndTick=<int> }
Monitor.description: Monitors electromagnetic field quantities at specific point locations over time. Useful for tracking the time evolution of fields at points of interest and debugging simulation behavior.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the monitor, which also is used in the dataset name in the result file.

parameters.name: Location
parameters.desc: Locations to monitor as coordinate triplets in um.

parameters.name: Quantity
parameters.desc: Optional. Specifies the quantities to monitor. Options include AbsElectricField, CplxEMField, CplxElectricField, RealElectricField(X/Y/Z), ImagElectricField(X/Y/Z), AbsMagneticField, CplxMagneticField, RealMagneticField(X/Y/Z), ImagMagneticField(X/Y/Z). Default: {AbsElectricField}.

parameters.name: Frequency
parameters.desc: Optional. Monitor frequency in s-1. Default is calculated from the excitation wavelength.

parameters.name: StartTick
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active tick step interval. Default: 0.

parameters.name: EndTick
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active tick step interval.

parameters.name: StartTime
parameters.desc: Optional. Beginning of the active time interval. Default: 0.

parameters.name: EndTime
parameters.desc: Optional. End of the active time interval.

parameters.name: TickStep
parameters.desc: Optional. Monitoring is performed every N tick steps.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

Save.description: Saves raw electromagnetic field data to TDR files for postprocessing or restarting simulations. Unlike Extractor, Save preserves data on the native tensor grid without interpolation to a mixed-element grid.

parameters.name: Name
parameters.desc: Defines the name of the Save section, which also is used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.

parameters.name: Quantity
parameters.desc: Specifies the quantities to save. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, IncoherentAbsorbedPhotonDensity, PowerFluxDensity, CplxEMField, CplxElectricField, RealElectricField(X/Y/Z), ImagElectricField(X/Y/Z), CplxMagneticField, RealMagneticField(X/Y/Z), ImagMagneticField(X/Y/Z).

parameters.name: BoxCorner1
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be saved.

parameters.name: BoxCorner2
parameters.desc: Optional. One of the two corners of a box for which data must be saved.

parameters.name: Region
parameters.desc: Optional. Regions for which data must be saved.

parameters.name: WavelengthList
parameters.desc: Optional. List of wavelengths for DFT-type simulations.

parameters.name: WavelengthPrecision
parameters.desc: Optional. Precision for matching wavelengths. Default: 0.

parameters.name: WavelengthRange
parameters.desc: Optional. Wavelength range for DFT-type simulations as {min, max}.

Acceleware.description: Configures GPU hardware acceleration using the Acceleware framework for FDTD simulations. Enables execution on NVIDIA GPU accelerators for significantly improved simulation performance compared to CPU-only runs.

parameters.name: LibraryPath
parameters.desc: Optional. Path to the Acceleware library directory.

parameters.name: LogFilePrefix
parameters.desc: Optional. Prefix for GPU acceleration log files.

parameters.name: LogLevel
parameters.desc: Optional. Verbosity level of GPU acceleration logging.

AlphaMax.description: Sets the maximum value of PML parameter alpha used in polynomial grading of the PML tensor coefficient. Default: 0.2.

AlphaProfile.description: Specifies the profile of PML parameter alpha used in grading of the PML tensor coefficient. The number of profile points must be double the size of the Thickness parameter.

Amplitude.description: Sets the signal amplitude in V/m. Default: 1.

AmplitudeScaling.description: Specifies the scaling factor for electric field amplitude in CodeVExcitation. Default: 1.

AnchorPoint1.description: Specifies the anchor point (of smallest coordinates) for the first CODE V data file in um.

AnchorPoint2.description: Specifies the anchor point (of smallest coordinates) for the second CODE V data file in um.

ArraySize.description: Specifies the number of times the near-field domain is replicated in each coordinate direction for far-field computation. Default: {1 1}.

Axis.description: Specifies the axis convention used for the simulation domain. Used to control coordinate system orientation.

AzimuthalCutList.description: Defines an explicit list of azimuthal angles in degrees for constant-azimuthal-angle far-field plots.

AzimuthalCutRange.description: Defines a range of azimuthal angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees for constant-azimuthal-angle far-field plots.

AzimuthalRange.description: Specifies the range and discretization of azimuthal angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees for far-field computation. Default: {0 360 1}.

BeamCenter.description: Specifies the coordinates of the center (focus) of the Gaussian beam in um.

BeamPower.description: Sets the signal power of the Gaussian beam in W. Default: 2.08478e-15.

BeamRadius.description: Specifies the radius (waist) of the Gaussian beam in um.

BoxCenter.description: Specifies the center of a nonaxis-aligned box in um for Sensor domain definition.

BoxCorner1.description: Specifies one of the two corners of a box that defines the spatial domain. Supports min/max keywords for device extents.

contexts.Plot: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be plotted.
contexts.Extractor: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be extracted.
contexts.Sensor: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the sensor domain.
contexts.Farfield: One of the two corners of a box defining the near-field plane for far-field computation.
contexts.Save: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be saved.
contexts.Detector: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the detector domain.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

BoxCorner2.description: Specifies the second corner of a box that defines the spatial domain. Supports min/max keywords for device extents.

contexts.Plot: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be plotted.
contexts.Extractor: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be extracted.
contexts.Sensor: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the sensor domain.
contexts.Farfield: One of the two corners of a box defining the near-field plane for far-field computation.
contexts.Save: One of the two corners of a box for which data must be saved.
contexts.Detector: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the detector domain.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: One of the two corners of a box that specifies the excitation plane.

BoxDimensions.description: Specifies the dimensions of a nonaxis-aligned box in um for Sensor domain definition.

BreakOnError.description: Controls whether the simulation stops if an error is encountered during the simulation. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

CRIMIPath.description: Specifies the search path for shared objects used by the complex refractive index model interface. Default: '.'.

CRIModel.description: Specifies the name of a user-provided complex refractive index model.

CarrierDep.description: Controls the carrier dependency of the real and imaginary parts of the complex refractive index. Options: Real, Imag.

CompressTDR.description: Controls whether output TDR files are compressed beyond the basic compression level. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

CoordinateTransformation.description: Specifies the type of coordinate transformation for Sensor integration. Options: Standard, Unified. Default: Unified.

Delay.description: Specifies the number of signal periods before the excitation signal starts. Default: 0.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Number of signal periods before the plane wave signal starts.
contexts.CodeVExcitation: Number of signal periods before the CODE V excitation signal starts.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Number of signal periods before the Gaussian beam signal starts.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Number of signal periods before the truncated plane wave signal starts.

DeltaK.description: Activates the dispersive model for k + DeltaK >= n. Default: 0.

Direction.description: Sets the illumination direction with respect to the coordinate system of the input tensor grid. Automatically sets Theta, Phi, Psi, and the excitation plane. Options: fromTop, fromBottom.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Illumination direction for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Illumination direction for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Illumination direction for truncated plane wave excitation.

Domain.description: Specifies whether values for Volume or Surface will be plotted. Options: Surface, Volume. Default: Volume.

DomainDecomposition.description: Overrides automatic MPI domain decomposition to enforce decomposition in only one Cartesian direction. Options: Automatic, X, Y, Z. Default: Automatic.

Domains.description: Specifies the set operation on volumes defined by region and box corners for Sensor absorption and optical generation. Options: United, Intersecting, Separate. Default: Separate.

DownSampling.description: Specifies the downsampling rate of the DFT computation.

EllipticalPolarizationMagnitude.description: Sets the polarization ratio magnitude for elliptical polarization. Default: 0.

EllipticalPolarizationPhase.description: Sets the polarization ratio phase in degrees for elliptical polarization. Default: 0.

EndTick.description: Specifies the end of the active tick step interval. Default: +inf.

contexts.Plot: End of the active tick step interval for plotting.
contexts.Sensor: End of the active tick step interval for sensing.
contexts.RTA: End of the active tick step interval for RTA computation.
contexts.Monitor: End of the active tick step interval for monitoring.
contexts.Detector: End of the active tick step interval for detection.

EndTime.description: Specifies the end of the active time interval in seconds. Default: +inf.

contexts.Plot: End of the active time interval for plotting.
contexts.Sensor: End of the active time interval for sensing.
contexts.RTA: End of the active time interval for RTA computation.
contexts.Monitor: End of the active time interval for monitoring.
contexts.Detector: End of the active time interval for detection.

ExcludeMaterial.description: Specifies names of materials to which the current section specification does not apply.

contexts.PECMedia: Materials excluded from PEC medium specification.
contexts.PMCMedia: Materials excluded from PMC medium specification.
contexts.DispersiveMedia: Materials excluded from dispersive medium specification.

ExcludeRegion.description: Specifies names of regions to which the current section specification does not apply.

contexts.PECMedia: Regions excluded from PEC medium specification.
contexts.PMCMedia: Regions excluded from PMC medium specification.
contexts.DispersiveMedia: Regions excluded from dispersive medium specification.

Extrapolate.description: Controls extrapolation behavior for interpolation of datasets in FieldDataFile. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

FailureOnUnreachedTolerance.description: Specifies whether the exit code will be set to nonzero if the simulation has not reached the specified tolerance. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

Field.description: Specifies the electromagnetic field component type for output or excitation.

FieldDataFile.description: Specifies a data file containing datasets (e.g., spatial temperature profile) on which the complex refractive index depends.

FinalPlot.description: Controls whether a final plot is created at the end of the simulation. Options: Yes, No. Default: Yes.

Frequency.description: Specifies the signal frequency in s-1. Alternative to Wavelength for defining the excitation.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Signal frequency for plane wave excitation.
contexts.CodeVExcitation: Signal frequency for CODE V excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Signal frequency for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Signal frequency for truncated plane wave excitation.
contexts.Detector: Detector frequency. Default is calculated from excitation wavelength.
contexts.Sensor: Sensor frequency. Default is calculated from excitation wavelength.
contexts.Monitor: Monitor frequency. Default is calculated from excitation wavelength.

GainDep.description: Controls the gain dependency of the real part of the complex refractive index. Options: RealLin, RealLog.

GridFile.description: Specifies the tensor grid file for the simulation, or the mixed-element grid file for output data.

contexts.Globals: Tensor grid file for the simulation.
contexts.Plot: Name of mixed-element grid file for output data.
contexts.Extractor: Name of mixed-element grid file for output data.

IgnoreMaterials.description: Controls whether interpolation between vertices of different materials is permitted when loading datasets from FieldDataFile. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

InputDataFile.description: Specifies the names of two input data files from CODE V optical design software.

IntegrationRange.description: Specifies integration ranges and discretization for far-field power computation in format {MinAzi, MaxAzi, AziStep, MinPol, MaxPol, PolStep}.

Intensity.description: Sets the signal intensity in W/cm^2. Default: 1.32721e-07.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Signal intensity for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Signal intensity for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Signal intensity for truncated plane wave excitation.

InterfaceAveraging.description: Controls whether interface averaging is granted for dispersive regions or materials. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

Interpolation.description: Specifies the method of interpolating data from the tensor grid to a mixed-element grid. Options: Standard, Simple, Conservative. Default: Standard.

contexts.Plot: Method of interpolating plot data from tensor grid to mixed-element grid.
contexts.Extractor: Method of interpolating extraction data from tensor grid to mixed-element grid.

KappaMax.description: Sets the maximum value of PML parameter kappa used in polynomial grading of the PML tensor coefficient. Default: 15.

KappaProfile.description: Specifies the profile of PML parameter kappa used in grading of the PML tensor coefficient. The number of profile points must be double the size of the Thickness parameter.

LibraryPath.description: Specifies the path to the Acceleware library directory for GPU acceleration.

LoadFile.description: Specifies the name of the results file to be loaded for postprocessing.

Location.description: Specifies the point locations to monitor as coordinate triplets in um.

Log.description: Specifies quantities written as DOE parameters to the log file. Options: R, T, A, RTA, Rnorm, Tnorm, Anorm, all, none. Default: {all}.

LogFile.description: Specifies the name of the log file. If the name ends with .z or .gz, a compressed log file will be written.

LogFilePrefix.description: Specifies the prefix for GPU acceleration log files.

LogLevel.description: Controls the verbosity level of GPU acceleration logging.

LogPrecision.description: Specifies the number of digits to the right of the decimal point for DOE parameters written to the log file. Default: 3.

Material.description: Specifies the names of materials to which the current section applies.

contexts.ComplexRefractiveIndex: Materials to which the complex refractive index specification applies.
contexts.DispersiveMedia: Materials to which the dispersive medium specification applies.
contexts.PECMedia: Materials to which the PEC medium specification applies.
contexts.PMCMedia: Materials to which the PMC medium specification applies.
contexts.Sensor: Materials to which the sensor applies.

MaxWavelength.description: Specifies the end wavelength of the DFT wavelength table.

MinWavelength.description: Specifies the start wavelength of the DFT wavelength table.

Mode.description: Specifies the integration mode for Sensor. Integrate integrates over surface or volume; Average divides by area or volume. Options: Integrate, Average. Default: {Integrate Average}.

Model.description: Selects the dispersive model for materials. Options: Debye, Drude, DrudeLorentz, DrudeModLorentz, Lorentz, ModLorentz, SingleDipoleDebye, SingleDipoleDrude.

ModelParameters.description: Specifies how dispersive model parameters are determined. Options: ComputeFromComplexRefractiveIndex, UserDefined. Default: ComputeFromComplexRefractiveIndex.

NRise.description: Specifies the number of signal periods before full amplitude is reached. Default: 2.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Signal periods before full amplitude for plane wave excitation.
contexts.CodeVExcitation: Signal periods before full amplitude for CODE V excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Signal periods before full amplitude for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Signal periods before full amplitude for truncated plane wave excitation.

Name.description: Defines the name of the section, used for output file naming or dataset identification.

contexts.Plot: Defines the name of the plot, used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.
contexts.Extractor: Defines the name of the extractor, used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.
contexts.Sensor: Defines the name of the sensor, used in the dataset name in the result file.
contexts.Farfield: Defines the name of the far field, used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.
contexts.Monitor: Defines the name of the monitor, used in the dataset name in the result file.
contexts.Save: Defines the name of the Save section, used for the output file name by appending _eml.tdr.

NumberOfPlaneWaves.description: Specifies the number of excitation plane waves for plane wave and truncated plane wave excitations. Default: 1.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Number of plane waves for plane wave excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Number of plane waves for truncated plane wave excitation.

NumberOfThreads.description: Specifies the number of threads for shared-memory parallelization. Either an integer greater than zero or 'maximum'. Default: 1.

NumberOfWavelengths.description: Specifies the number of elements in the DFT wavelength table.

NumericalAperture.description: Specifies the numerical aperture for excitation. Default: 0.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Numerical aperture for plane wave excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Numerical aperture for truncated plane wave excitation.

OrderAlpha.description: Specifies the order of polynomial grading for PML parameter alpha. Default: 1.

OrderKappa.description: Specifies the order of polynomial grading for PML parameter kappa. Default: 3.

OrderSigma.description: Specifies the order of polynomial grading for PML parameter sigma. Default: 3.

OutputFilePrefix.description: Specifies a string to be prepended to all output file names including the log file. Default: empty.

OverSampling.description: Reduces the calculated maximum stable time step by the OverSampling factor. Default: 1.

ParallelLicenses.description: Specifies the list of allowed licenses to be used by EMW when run in parallel mode. Options: MPI, SMP. Default: {MPI SMP}.

ParameterFile.description: Specifies the material parameter file for the simulation.

PartialCoherenceFactor.description: Specifies the partial coherence factor for excitation. Default: 1.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Partial coherence factor for plane wave excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Partial coherence factor for truncated plane wave excitation.

Phase.description: Specifies the phase of the electromagnetic field in degrees.

PhaseShift.description: Specifies the linear phase shift for the electric field in degrees. Default: 0.

Phi.description: Specifies the azimuth angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 0.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Azimuth angle for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Azimuth angle for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Azimuth angle for truncated plane wave excitation.

PlaneX.description: Specifies a line (2D) or plane (3D) perpendicular to the x-axis for spatial domain selection.

contexts.Plot: Plot domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.Extractor: Extractor domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.Sensor: Sensor domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.Detector: Detector domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the x-axis.

PlaneY.description: Specifies a line (2D) or plane (3D) perpendicular to the y-axis for spatial domain selection.

contexts.Plot: Plot domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.Extractor: Extractor domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.Sensor: Sensor domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.Detector: Detector domain specified as a line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation line or plane perpendicular to the y-axis.

PlaneZ.description: Specifies a plane perpendicular to the z-axis for spatial domain selection.

contexts.Plot: Plot domain specified as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.Extractor: Extractor domain specified as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.Sensor: Sensor domain specified as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.Detector: Detector domain specified as a plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Excitation plane perpendicular to the z-axis.

PolarCutList.description: Defines an explicit list of polar angles in degrees for constant-polar-angle far-field plots.

PolarCutRange.description: Defines a range of polar angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees for constant-polar-angle far-field plots.

PolarRange.description: Specifies the range and discretization of polar angles {Min, Max, Step} in degrees for far-field computation. Default: {0 90 1}.

Polarization.description: Specifies the polarization state, either TE (0) or TM (1), or a value between 0 and 1. Default: 0.5.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization for plane wave excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization for truncated plane wave excitation.

PolarizationAngle.description: Specifies the polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization angle for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Polarization angle for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization angle for truncated plane wave excitation.

Psi.description: Specifies the polarization angle in degrees. Default: 45.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization angle for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Polarization angle for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Polarization angle for truncated plane wave excitation.

Quantity.description: Specifies the field quantities to plot, extract, monitor, or save.

contexts.Plot: Quantities to be plotted. Options include AbsElectricField, CplxRefIndex, AbsorbedPhotonDensity, Region, and many more.
contexts.Extractor: Quantities to extract. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, PowerFluxDensity, OpticalGeneration, and field components.
contexts.Sensor: Integration quantity. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, PowerFluxDensity, PhotonFluxDensity, OpticalGeneration.
contexts.Monitor: Quantities to monitor at point locations. Options: AbsElectricField, CplxEMField, and field components.
contexts.Save: Quantities to save. Options: AbsorbedPhotonDensity, PowerFluxDensity, CplxEMField, and field components.

Radius.description: Specifies the radius (distance) at which the far field is calculated in um. Default: 1000.

Region.description: Specifies the names of regions to which the current section applies, or a region-based spatial domain.

contexts.ComplexRefractiveIndex: Regions to which the complex refractive index specification applies.
contexts.DispersiveMedia: Regions to which the dispersive medium specification applies.
contexts.PECMedia: Regions to which the PEC medium specification applies.
contexts.PMCMedia: Regions to which the PMC medium specification applies.
contexts.Sensor: Regions to which the sensor applies.
contexts.Detector: Valid box or region name of the tensor grid where the detector is evaluated.
contexts.Farfield: Near-field region to be used for far-field computation.
contexts.Plot: Regions for which data must be plotted.
contexts.Extractor: Regions for which data must be extracted.
contexts.Save: Regions for which data must be saved.
contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Box that specifies the excitation plane.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Box that specifies the excitation plane.

ResultFile.description: Specifies the name of the result file. Default: result_eml.plt.

RotationAngles.description: Specifies the rotation angles (theta, phi, psi) of a nonaxis-aligned box in degrees. Default: {0 90 0}.

ScatteredFieldOnly.description: Specifies whether only scattered fields are involved. Options: Yes, No. Default: No.

contexts.Plot: Specifies whether the plot involves only scattered fields.
contexts.Extractor: Specifies whether the extractor involves only scattered fields.
contexts.Sensor: Specifies whether the sensor involves only scattered fields.

Sensors.description: Specifies the type of sensors to be activated for RTA computation. Options: R, T, A, all. Default: {all}.

Sides.description: Specifies the sides to which the boundary or surface plotting applies. Options: All, X, Xmin, Xmax, Y, Ymin, Ymax, Z, Zmin, Zmax. Default: {All}.

contexts.Boundary: Sides to which the boundary specification applies.
contexts.Plot: When Domain=Surface, defines the sidewall where plotting will be performed.
contexts.Sensor: If the quantity is a flux, specifies the sides for integration.

Sigma.description: Specifies the width of the transient Gaussian pulse in terms of the number of signal periods. Default: 1.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Width of transient Gaussian pulse for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Width of transient Gaussian pulse for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Width of transient Gaussian pulse for truncated plane wave excitation.

SigmaMax.description: Sets the maximum value of PML parameter sigma used in polynomial grading of the PML tensor coefficient. The default is computed automatically from grid spacing and refractive index.

SigmaProfile.description: Specifies the profile of PML parameter sigma used in grading of the PML tensor coefficient. The number of profile points must be double the size of the Thickness parameter.

Signal.description: Sets the transient form of the excitation signal. Options: Gauss, Harmonic. Default: Harmonic.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Transient signal form for plane wave excitation.
contexts.CodeVExcitation: Transient signal form for CODE V excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Transient signal form for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Transient signal form for truncated plane wave excitation.

StartTick.description: Specifies the beginning of the active tick step interval. Default: 0.

contexts.Plot: Beginning of the active tick step interval for plotting.
contexts.Sensor: Beginning of the active tick step interval for sensing.
contexts.RTA: Beginning of the active tick step interval for RTA computation.
contexts.Monitor: Beginning of the active tick step interval for monitoring.
contexts.Detector: Number of tick steps when to start the detector evaluation.

StartTime.description: Specifies the beginning of the active time interval in seconds. Default: 0.

contexts.Plot: Beginning of the active time interval for plotting.
contexts.Sensor: Beginning of the active time interval for sensing.
contexts.RTA: Beginning of the active time interval for RTA computation.
contexts.Monitor: Beginning of the active time interval for monitoring.
contexts.Detector: Simulation time when to start the detector evaluation.

StepX.description: Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the x-direction. Default: 10.

StepY.description: Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the y-direction. Default: 10.

StepZ.description: Detection is performed on every N-th grid point in the z-direction. Default: 10.

TdrNativeTensorGridUnit.description: Overrides automatic detection of length unit in the input tensor grid. Options: Automatic, m, um. Default: Automatic.

Temperature.description: Specifies the global device temperature in Kelvin. Default: 300.

TemperatureDep.description: Controls the temperature dependency of the real and imaginary parts of the complex refractive index. Options: Real, Imag.

Theta.description: Specifies the polar angle of incidence in degrees. Default: 180.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Polar angle for plane wave excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Polar angle for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Polar angle for truncated plane wave excitation.

Thickness.description: Specifies the thickness of the PML boundary in terms of the number of tensor-grid cells. Default: 15.

TickStep.description: Specifies that the operation is performed every N tick steps. Default: 100.

contexts.Plot: Plotting is performed every N tick steps.
contexts.Sensor: Sensing is performed every N tick steps.
contexts.RTA: Sensing is performed every N tick steps for RTA computation.
contexts.Monitor: Monitoring is performed every N tick steps.

TimeStep.description: Overwrites the calculated simulation time step in seconds.

Tolerance.description: The simulation is terminated when the maximum deviation is smaller than this value. Default: 0.001.

TotalSimulationTime.description: Specifies the maximum simulation time in seconds after which the simulation is terminated. Default: +inf.

TotalTimeSteps.description: Specifies the maximum number of time steps to be performed. Default: +inf.

Type.description: Specifies the type of the boundary condition, detector, or complex refractive index distribution.

contexts.Boundary: Boundary condition type. Options: CPML, Higdon, Mur, PEC, Periodic, PeriodicOblique, PMC. Default: PeriodicOblique.
contexts.Detector: Detector type. Options: Periodic, Decayed. Default: Periodic.
contexts.ComplexRefractiveIndex: Complex refractive index distribution type. Options: Homogeneous, Inhomogeneous, FromFile. Default: Homogeneous.

UnavailableLicenseAction.description: Specifies the action to be taken when the requested license is not available. Options: serial, reduce, wait, abort. Default: serial.

Wavelength.description: Specifies the signal wavelength in nm. Alternative to Frequency for defining the excitation.

contexts.PlaneWaveExcitation: Signal wavelength for plane wave excitation.
contexts.CodeVExcitation: Signal wavelength for CODE V excitation.
contexts.GaussianBeamExcitation: Signal wavelength for Gaussian beam excitation.
contexts.TruncatedPlaneWaveExcitation: Signal wavelength for truncated plane wave excitation.

WavelengthDep.description: Controls the wavelength dependency of the real and imaginary parts of the complex refractive index. Options: Real, Imag.

WavelengthList.description: Specifies a list of wavelengths in nm to be used for DFT-type simulations.

contexts.Plot: List of wavelengths for DFT-type plot simulations.
contexts.Extractor: List of wavelengths for DFT-type extractor simulations.
contexts.Sensor: List of wavelengths for DFT-type sensor simulations.
contexts.Farfield: List of wavelengths for DFT-type far-field simulations.
contexts.RTA: List of wavelengths for DFT-type RTA simulations.
contexts.Monitor: List of wavelengths for DFT-type monitor simulations.
contexts.Save: List of wavelengths for DFT-type save simulations.

WavelengthPrecision.description: Specifies the precision used for matching wavelengths between WavelengthList and DFT wavelengths. Default: 0.

contexts.Plot: Precision for matching wavelengths in plot output.
contexts.Extractor: Precision for matching wavelengths in extractor output.
contexts.Sensor: Precision for matching wavelengths in sensor output.
contexts.Farfield: Precision for matching wavelengths in far-field output.
contexts.RTA: Precision for matching wavelengths in RTA output.
contexts.Monitor: Precision for matching wavelengths in monitor output.
contexts.Save: Precision for matching wavelengths in save output.

WavelengthRange.description: Specifies the wavelength range {min, max} in nm for DFT-type simulations.

contexts.Plot: Wavelength range for DFT-type plot simulations.
contexts.Extractor: Wavelength range for DFT-type extractor simulations.
contexts.Sensor: Wavelength range for DFT-type sensor simulations.
contexts.Farfield: Wavelength range for DFT-type far-field simulations.
contexts.RTA: Wavelength range for DFT-type RTA simulations.
contexts.Monitor: Wavelength range for DFT-type monitor simulations.
contexts.Save: Wavelength range for DFT-type save simulations.

WriteBehavior.description: Controls how consecutive plot instances are written to file. Options: Numbered, Overwrite, OverwriteAndNumbered. Default: Numbered.
